name: mpesa-mcp
description: Give AI agents access to M-Pesa Daraja API and Africa's Talking. Trigger STK Push payments, check transaction status, send SMS to 20+ African telecom networks, and top up airtime.

tools.name: mpesa_stk_push
tools.description: Trigger M-Pesa STK Push payment prompt on customer's phone

tools.name: mpesa_stk_query
tools.description: Check the status of an STK Push transaction

tools.name: mpesa_transaction_status
tools.description: Query any M-Pesa transaction by receipt number

tools.name: sms_send
tools.description: Send SMS to up to 1,000 recipients across 20+ African telecom networks

tools.name: airtime_send
tools.description: Top up airtime for any mobile subscriber
